# AgentFortress

> AgentFortress is an open-source runtime security monitoring platform for AI agents — the CrowdStrike for LLM-powered agents.

AgentFortress detects and blocks prompt injection, PII leakage, data exfiltration, jailbreaks, and anomalous behavior in real-time. It wraps LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, and any custom agent with one line of code.

## Install

- Python: pip install agentfortress
- JavaScript: npm install agentfortress
- Ruby: gem install agentfortress
- Rust: cargo add agentfortress
- Go: go get github.com/aayush022008/agentfortress@v1.0.0
- .NET: dotnet add package AgentFortress

## Key capabilities

- Real-time threat detection: prompt injection, PII, data exfiltration, jailbreaks
- Policy enforcement: BLOCK, ALERT, LOG, RATE_LIMIT
- Cryptographically signed audit logs
- Session replay and forensic analysis
- ML anomaly detection (Isolation Forest, NLP classifier, behavioral baseline)
- MITRE ATT&CK mapping for AI threats
- Compliance: GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, EU AI Act
- SOC Dashboard (React + WebSocket)
- Multi-tenant RBAC
- SSO/SAML support
- Integrations: Slack, PagerDuty, Datadog, Splunk, Jira

## License

MIT — free forever, no paid plans.
